text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap is interviewed by several reporters, but
feels ill at ease because she isn't able to answer
the questions as well as she wants.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross, having debuted a little earlier
than Oguri Cap, gives her some advice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After coming to an important realization, Oguri
Cap makes an impressive declaration at a press
conference.
